title: Sugar Bee Michelle
description: Sugar Bee Michelle nya~, Replaced the bee’s texture and sounds nya~,Make it cute and lovely
body:
### Replaced the bee's texture and sounds with Michelle from game Strinova



Theoretically, this works in all versions that added bees starting from [1.15.x]—just ignore compatibility prompts.


Due to model changes for baby bees in the newer [26.1.x] version, only adult bees will have their textures modified after installation.

```

```
Memes are fan-made creations by players：bilibili-咸鱼小章鱼
